input.subject: string (required) - subject line topic
input.purpose: string (required) - why the email is being sent
input.tone: enum (required) - one of: Professional, Friendly, Formal, Apologetic, Persuasive
input.key_points: array (required) - main topics to cover in the email

output.subject: string - refined subject line derived from input subject
output.email_body: string - complete email with greeting, paragraphs, and closing signature
